svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="个人 RAG 知识库按主题分库" id="kb"> <mxGraphModel dx="-604" dy="-169" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" height="110" width="1100" x="30" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q1" parent="1"
